$comment: Presence of this file enables the dispatch-auto Pi extension in this repo. This is the committed baseline shared across active repos. Per-machine overrides (accounts, profile paths, temporary model routing) belong in agents/orchestration.local.json (gitignored).

$schema_notes.timeoutMinutes: Wall-clock cap per subprocess. Env DISPATCH_AUTO_TIMEOUT_MS=<ms> wins over both root and per-role for one-off use.
$schema_notes.defaultPiProvider: Token value substituted for $defaultPiProvider in model preset args. Swap this single field to globally re-route non-Codex models such as DeepSeek/GLM.
$schema_notes.modelPresets: Named arg arrays appended to the launch command. Reference one from a role via roles.<Role>.modelPreset. Use $defaultPiProvider token to make the preset provider-agnostic; explicit provider strings such as openai-codex/ bypass token substitution.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.binary: pi (default) or claude. Claude uses --session-id on first call, --resume on subsequent calls; Pi uses --session-dir + --continue.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.configDir: Sets CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (claude) or PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR (pi). Use only in agents/orchestration.local.json unless all machines share the same profile layout.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.modelPreset: Key into modelPresets. Resolved args are appended before extraArgs.
$schema_notes.roles.<Role>.extraArgs: Appended after the preset and before the prompt. Use for per-role one-offs.
